# The Walker Between the Stars
![](data:image/jpeg;base64,)

---

*The Unknowable Horror Beyond the Void*

---

## Legend
Before the first demons and devils emerged from the pure essence of evil, and before the first gods were born of mortal prayers, there existed the elder beings known as Those That Came Before. These ancient gods had long since perished before the dawn of the new pantheons. Among them was the Walker Between the Stars—an unknowable horror whose true name invites despair and whose visage brings soul-shattering death.

In the darkest, most forsaken corners of the world, gibbering cultists cling to their beliefs, uttering maddening prayers and offering sacrifices to appease that which is dead yet cannot die. Long has the Walker slumbered, waiting for the day it awakens to devour the universe.

---

## Summoning Rules
- Spirit Level: 4th
- Alignment: Chaotic Neutral (CN)
- Constellation: Void
- Binding DC: 24

### Totems
You gain a +2 totem bonus on binding checks made with the Walker Between the Stars if one of the following is met, or +4 if two or more are met:
- You are blindfolded during the entire summoning ritual.
- You perform the ritual in an area devoid of natural light (a cave, deep underground, or during a moonless night).
- You scatter fragments of a meteorite or star-metal in the summoning circle.

### Ceremony
The Pact Maker must be blindfolded and possess at least 7 ranks in Knowledge (Planes) to perform the ritual. While blindfolded, the Pact Maker chants the forgotten names of the stars and traces impossible geometries with a silvered dagger dipped in black ink. The air thickens and warps as unseen forces press against the veil of reality.
### Manifestation
The space around the blindfolded Pact Maker seems to shift and lose all sense of up and down. A biting chill fills the air, and the Pact Maker's mind is invaded by an oppressive presence, filling their thoughts with terror and dread. If the Walker speaks, the Pact Maker risks losing their sanity forever.

---

## Major Granted Abilities

### Many Angled One (Su)
You gain the ability to Walk Through Space, functioning as the Teleport spell up to 25’ + 5ft / 2 levels as a Move action. You must end this movement in an unoccupied space you can stand on within line of sight. Alternatively, you may use this ability to stand from prone as a move action.  The binder can use a Standard Action in the same round as using Walk Through Space.

Teleporting in this manner does not provoke attacks of opportunity.  
You can use this ability once every 5 rounds.

**Capstone Empowerment:** Master of the Many Angles (Su) — When you use Walk through Space to teleport, you may bring along one willing creature of Medium size or smaller who is within 5 feet of you.

---

## Minor Granted Abilities

### Speaker of the Dread Truths (Su)
As a standard action, you speak a dread word of universal truth that unsettles and weakens foes within a 30-foot radius.
- All enemies within range must succeed on a Will saving throw (DC 10 + ½ Binder level + Charisma modifier) or suffer one of the following effects for 1d4 rounds.

| HD                   | Effect      |
| -------------------- | ----------- |
| - Equal to Binder HD | - Shaken    |
| - Below Binder HD    | - Dazed     |
| - Above Binder HD    | - No affect |
Creatures that succeed the save are immune to this ability for 24 hours.
This is a mind-affecting ability.  

### Visage of the Incomprehensible (Su)
Your eyes appear hollow, filled with writhing, glowing worms. You suffer a –10 penalty on Diplomacy and Bluff checks. You must be showing the Walker Between the Stars sign. You emit a gaze attack in a 15-foot cone. All creatures in this area must succeed on a Will save (DC 10 + ½ Pact Maker level + Charisma modifier) or are paralyzed for 1d3 rounds.  
### Whispers of the Unknowable (Ex)
You gain a bonus on Knowledge (Planes) checks equal to your 1/2 Pact Maker level.

---

## Signs and Influence
- **Physical Sign:** Your eyes hollow out and appear filled with wriggling, glowing worms.
- **Personality Influence:** You refuse to enter temples or churches of any kind, spurning organized religion and its lies.
- **Favored Allies:** Aberrations, Outsiders (nonlawful), and cultists.
- **Favored Enemies:** Celestials, Lawful outsiders, and any who preach the lie of faith.

---
### Vestigial Boon
#### Madness Touched
You gain immunity to mind-affecting effects. This replaces Visage of the Incomprehensible (Su).
